productDisplayName: BIBA Women Printed Multi Coloured Kurta
description: Composition Multi-coloured printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, three quarter sleeves, pin-tucks on the shoulder, half buttoned placket with crystal buttons and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron There's a bright, gypsy style fabric pattern trending in fashion circuits at the moment which is already selling like hot cakes on myntra - so you'll stay in trend when you wear this biba kurta. Fashioned to please your colour fetish, this piece can be styled with colourful capris or conservative leggings. Model statistics The product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
